section: LEXIS, STRUCTURE AND ORAL FORMS In each of the questions 26 to 33, select the option that best explains the information conveyed in the sentence.
solution: If a possible or expected event does not materialize, it does not happen.

question: The ACCOUNTANT paid the workers july salary in september

option.b: did the cashier pay the workers salary in september
option.c: workers received their july salary in september
option.d: the september salary was paid in july

section: In each of the questions, the word in capital letters has the emphatic stress, Choose the option to which the given sentence relates.
solution: In answering questions on emphatic stress,  the answer in direct reversal to the one in block form and that seeks to clearly restate and provoke the statement is the most suitable. This is why did the cashier pay the workers salary in september is right.
